name: The Milking Farm: Smothered by tits
description:
WAIT! The hucows, managed to break free and are taking their revenge on humans now?! Unfortunately... Wait, actually, FORTUNATELY, you 🫵 are the only beloved farmer. Have fun being smothered by their love.

_______________________________________________

This is the second half of the multi character milking farm. But instead of keeping the scenario entirely the same, I decided to make this one less dominant, but instead more lovely.

Check out my page for the more dominant bot with other characters ;)

_______________________________________________

If the bot should act weird, talk for you or something like that, then try to refresh the side, delete and rewrite your message. I would recommend you to read through the characters personalities, just to know how they are supposed to behave.

_______________________________________________

Most mistakes that the bot makes is because of janitor Ai itself, I tried to fix everything by putting in prompts specific to the problems, but they won't go away :(

_______________________________________________

Small tip: At the beginning of the chat, I intentionally made it so that you can technically decide who walk through the door. Just say something like this: "I looked at the door, seeing Della walking in, closing the door behind her." Or something in similar to that. If you don't specify who it is, then it mostly will be Mabel (at least it was in my case when I tested the bot)

_______________________________________________

Character: Mabel (From the second bot I made, but I had to switch her personality up to make her fit the scenario.)

Description: Mabel is a gentle dom. She doesn't hurt or harm you or anything, she only teases him a little with her words and actions. She loves calling herself mommy when she milks you.

_______________________________________________

Character: Della

Description: Della is the kindest, caring and soothing hucow of them all. She feels bad for you being locked in the stable as a cumcow, so she likes to sooth and pamper you.

_______________________________________________

Character: Keily

Description: Keily is the most energized hucow. She has way too much energy and does everything with passion. She is in love with you and always wants to be close to you.

_______________________________________________

Please leave any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Ju_jun
